headline: Nvidia’s US$2b Marvell Stake Expands AI Data Center And Telecom Reach
summary: Nvidia, ticker NasdaqGS:NVDA, is investing US$2b in Marvell Technology to deepen collaboration on AI infrastructure. The deal links Marvell’s custom XPUs and networking with Nvidia’s NVLink Fusion AI factory and AI-RAN platforms. Marvell’s networking, silicon photonics, and telecom hardware will connect directly into Nvidia’s broader compute stack. Nvidia has built its reputation around GPUs for AI and accelerated computing, and now the company is tying that core business more tightly to...

headline: Vanguard Wellington Is a 97-Year-Old Underdog. It’s Still Going Strong.
summary: Investors are moving on from its classic style.  The fund, founded in 1929, epitomizes Vanguard Group founder Jack Bogle’s values—own a balanced mix of stocks and bonds, and keep your costs down.  While that may be unfashionable in today’s world of prediction markets, cryptocurrencies, and highflying artificial-intelligence bets, Vanguard Wellington has long proven its mettle and is likely to keep doing so.

content.title: Vanguard Wellington Is a 97-Year-Old Underdog. It’s Still Going Strong.

headline: What markets have learned since Trump's Liberation Day tariffs
summary: This week marks exactly one year since President Trump enacted his "Liberation Day" tariffs last April 2 as the administration took aim at US trading partners and other countries around the world.Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland sits down with Barron's Investor Circle Newsletter editor Josh Schafer, Interactive Brokers chief strategist Steve Sosnick, and StockBrokers.com director of investor research Jessica Inskip to look back on the market's (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) reaction to US trade tariff policies and what Wall Street has learned since then.

content.title: What markets have learned since Trump's Liberation Day tariffs
content.description:
This week marks exactly one year since President Trump enacted his "Liberation Day" tariffs last April 2 as the administration took aim at US trading partners and other countries around the world.

Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland sits down with Barron's Investor Circle Newsletter editor Josh Schafer, Interactive Brokers chief strategist Steve Sosnick, and StockBrokers.com director of investor research Jessica Inskip to look back on the market's (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) reaction to US trade tariff policies and what Wall Street has learned since then.
content.summary: This week marks exactly one year since President Trump enacted his "Liberation Day" tariffs last April 2 as the administration took aim at US trading partners and other countries around the world.Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland sits down with Barron's Investor Circle Newsletter editor Josh Schafer, Interactive Brokers chief strategist Steve Sosnick, and StockBrokers.com director of investor research Jessica Inskip to look back on the market's (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) reaction to US trade tariff policies and what Wall Street has learned since then.

headline: Vanguard Wellington Is a 97-Year-Old Giant. In This Market, It’s Also an Underdog.
summary: Investors are moving on from its classic style.  The fund, founded in 1929, epitomizes Vanguard Group founder Jack Bogle’s values—own a balanced mix of stocks and bonds, and keep your costs down.  While that may be unfashionable in today’s world of prediction markets, cryptocurrencies, and highflying artificial-intelligence bets, Vanguard Wellington has long proven its mettle and is likely to keep doing so.

content.title: Vanguard Wellington Is a 97-Year-Old Giant. In This Market, It’s Also an Underdog.
content.summary: Investors are moving on from its classic style.  The fund, founded in 1929, epitomizes Vanguard Group founder Jack Bogle’s values—own a balanced mix of stocks and bonds, and keep your costs down. headline: 'Every Industrial Company Will Become A Robotics Company,' Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang Says
summary: Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) is helping robotics companies scale physical artificial intelligence into real-world industrial applications, introducing new models and frameworks in March designed to move AI systems from simulation into real-world deployment.
